description:
You are an IT-support technician working through ticket “#2023-441 – Checksum verification for deployment binary”.

    Goal  
      • Produce a SHA-256 checksum file for the existing binary  
        /home/user/it_assets/installer_v3.2.bin  

    Required end-state  
      1. A new file named /home/user/it_assets/installer_v3.2.bin.sha256 must be present.  
      2. That file must contain exactly one text line, terminated by a single newline (ASCII 0x0A).  
      3. The line must be in the canonical sha256sum format produced by the GNU sha256sum utility when given only the bare filename:  

         <64 lowercase hexadecimal characters><two spaces>installer_v3.2.bin

         (Example of the format, **do not copy these numbers**:  
         d2d2d2…d2d2  installer_v3.2.bin⏎)

      4. No other text, spaces, or blank lines are permitted in the .sha256 file.

    Notes for the technician  
      • Work entirely in your normal user account; no sudo is needed.  
      • The “two spaces” between the hash and the filename are required (sha256sum inserts them automatically).  
      • Create the .sha256 file inside the same /home/user/it_assets directory.  
      • Do not alter the original installer_v3.2.bin file.  
      • Use standard Linux command-line utilities already available in most distributions.

    Once you have generated the checksum file, the ticket is considered resolved.
truth:
Initial files & directories created for the exercise:

      Directory: /home/user/it_assets           (permissions 755)
        └── installer_v3.2.bin                 (permissions 644, size 3 bytes, contents: ASCII string “abc” – no newline)

    Ground-truth SHA-256 for installer_v3.2.bin (content “abc”):
        ba7816bf8f01cfea414140de5dae2223b00361a396177a9cb410ff61f20015ad

    Expected artifact after successful task completion:

      File: /home/user/it_assets/installer_v3.2.bin.sha256  (permissions 644)
        • Single line of text:  
          ba7816bf8f01cfea414140de5dae2223b00361a396177a9cb410ff61f20015ad␠␠installer_v3.2.bin␊
          (␠ = space, two consecutive spaces; ␊ = newline, ASCII 0x0A)

    The automated test will:
      1. Verify that /home/user/it_assets/installer_v3.2.bin.sha256 exists.
      2. Read the file, trim nothing, and assert its exact byte sequence matches the line specified above.
      3. Confirm that no extra bytes follow the single newline.
name: task_000000_97b140c9
